name: Seafood Marinade for Grilling
recipeIngredient: Kabobs made of shrimp or scallops
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients well.
2. Marinate fish for 2 hours in the refrigerator.
3. Place fish on a hot grill and cook for 8 to 14 minutes per side, depending on thickness.
4. Baste with marinade.
